articles.title: High trust in AI leaves individuals vulnerable to “cognitive surrender,” study finds
articles.titleKo: AI에 대한 높은 신뢰가 개인을 "인지적 항복"에 취약하게 만든다는 연구 결과
articles.summary: People are increasingly outsourcing their thinking to artificial intelligence, bypassing critical reflection entirely. New research reveals that this "cognitive surrender" inflates confidence and causes users to blindly adopt algorithm-generated answers, even when the software is wrong.
articles.aiSummary:
As artificial intelligence technology advances, people increasingly rely on AI for decision-making, potentially bypassing critical thinking processes. This study investigates whether high trust in AI triggers "cognitive surrender," a phenomenon where users uncritically accept AI-generated responses without proper reflection. Researchers presented participants with AI-generated answers and measured their tendency to adopt them without scrutinizing the underlying logic or accuracy. The key finding revealed that individuals with high trust in AI blindly adopted algorithm-generated answers even when the software produced errors, without recognizing these mistakes. This indicates that greater reliance on AI correlates with diminished independent thinking and critical judgment capacity. The research's significance lies in warning against potential pitfalls of AI adoption and highlighting the need to design AI systems and education strategies that maintain user critical thinking. However, the study's generalizability may be limited as it was conducted in specific contexts with particular user populations.

##
articles.aiSummaryKo:
최근 인공지능 기술의 발전으로 사람들이 자신의 생각을 AI에 의존하는 경향이 증가하고 있습니다. 이 연구는 AI에 대한 높은 신뢰가 "인지적 항복"이라는 현상을 유발하는지 검증하기 위해 설계되었습니다. 연구진은 참가자들에게 AI가 생성한 답변을 제시한 후 비판적 검토 과정을 거치지 않고 이를 수용하는 경향을 측정했습니다. 핵심 결과는 AI를 신뢰하는 사람들이 알고리즘의 오류를 인식하지 못하고도 그 답변을 맹목적으로 채택했다는 것입니다. 이는 사용자의 신뢰도가 높을수록 독립적인 사고능력과 비판적 판단력이 감소함을 시사합니다. 이 연구의 의의는 AI 활용의 부작용을 경고하고, 향후 AI 교육과 설계에서 사용자의 비판적 사고를 유지하는 방법을 모색해야 함을 제시합니다. 다만 연구는 특정 상황과 사용자 집단에서만 수행되어 일반화에 제한이 있을 수 있습니다.

##

keyPoints: **AI 신뢰와 인지적 항복의 관계** / **Relationship between AI trust and cognitive surrender**: AI에 대한 높은 신뢰도가 사용자로 하여금 독립적인 사고 과정을 건너뛰고 알고리즘의 답변을 무비판적으로 수용하도록 유도

articles.title: Operating-Layer Controls for Onchain Language-Model Agents Under Real Capital
articles.titleKo: 실제 자본 조건에서 온체인 언어 모델 에이전트를 위한 운영 계층 제어

articles.aiSummary:
This research examines reliability in autonomous language-model agents that handle real capital and execute financial transactions. The study involved a 21-day deployment called 'DX Terminal Pro' where 3,505 user-funded agents traded actual ETH cryptocurrency in a bounded blockchain market. Users configured vault controls through structured interfaces and natural-language instructions, while only agents could make actual buy/sell decisions. The system generated 7.5 million agent invocations, approximately 300,000 onchain transactions, about $20 million in trading volume, with over 5,000 ETH deployed. This research provides valuable insights into AI agent reliability in real economic environments rather than simulations. However, the 21-day timeframe is relatively short, and results are specific to cryptocurrency markets, limiting generalization to other financial sectors.

##
articles.aiSummaryKo:

keyPoints: **실제 자본 기반 AI 에이전트 테스트** / Testing AI agents with real capital in actual blockchain markets rather than simulations

articles.title: Distill-Belief: Closed-Loop Inverse Source Localization and Characterization in Physical Fields
articles.titleKo: 증류-신념: 물리장에서의 폐루프 역방향 소스 위치 파악 및 특성화
articles.summary: arXiv:2604.26095v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: {Closed-loop inverse source localization and characterization (ISLC) requires a mobile agent to select measurements that localize sources and infer latent field parameters under strict time constraints.} {The core challenge lies in the belief-space objective: valid uncertainty estimation requires expensive Bayesian inference, whereas using fast learned belief model leads to reward hacking, in which the policy exploits approximation errors rather than actually reducing uncertainty.} {We propose \textbf{Distill-Belief}, a teacher--student framework
articles.aiSummary:
This research proposes a novel AI methodology to solve the inverse problem of locating and characterizing pollution sources in physical fields. The study is motivated by the challenge of a mobile agent selecting optimal measurement points within strict time constraints to simultaneously identify source locations and infer hidden field characteristics. The team developed "Distill-Belief," a teacher-student framework that reduces the computational cost of accurate Bayesian inference while preventing neural network-based fast models from exploiting approximation errors—a phenomenon called "reward hacking." The key contribution is guiding a policy network to actually collect information through an effective uncertainty estimation-based belief model. This method can be applied to various real-world applications including environmental monitoring, pollution tracking, and medical imaging. However, validation of performance in complex physical environments and very high-dimensional data remains a limitation requiring further investigation.

##
articles.aiSummaryKo:
본 연구는 물리 필드에서 오염원의 위치를 파악하고 특성을 규명하는 역산 문제를 해결하기 위한 새로운 AI 방법론을 제안한다. 이동형 에이전트가 제한된 시간 내에 최적의 측정 지점을 선택하여 오염원 위치와 필드의 숨겨진 특성을 동시에 파악해야 하는 도전적 상황이 배경이다. 연구팀은 '증류 신념(Distill-Belief)'이라는 교사-학생 프레임워크를 개발했는데, 이는 정확한 베이지안 추론의 계산 비용을 줄이면서도 신경망 기반 빠른 모델이 오류를 악용하는 문제를 방지한다. 핵심 기여는 불확실성을 효과적으로 추정하는 학습 기반 신념 모델을 통해 정책 네트워크가 실제 정보를 수집하도록 유도하는 것이다. 이 방법은 환경 모니터링, 오염 추적, 의료 이미징 등 다양한 실제 응용에 활용될 수 있다. 다만 복잡한 물리 환경이나 매우 높은 차원의 데이터에서의 성능 검증이 필요하다는 한계가 있다.

##

The key contribution is guiding a policy network to actually collect information through an effective uncertainty estimation-based belief model. This method can be applied to various real-world applications including environmental monitoring, pollution tracking, and medical imaging. However, validation of performance in complex physical environments and very high-dimensional data remains a limitation requiring further investigation.

##
keyPoints: **폐쇄루프 역산 문제의 해결** / Solving closed-loop inverse source localization: 이동형 에이전트가 물리 필드의 오염원 위치와 특성을 동시에 파악하기 위한 인공지능 기반 솔루션 제시
**보상 해킹(Reward Hacking) 문제 극복** / Overcoming reward hacking: 빠른 신경망 모델이 실제 불확실성 감소가 아닌 근사 오류를 악용하는 것을 방지하는 교사-학생 증류 방식 적용
**계산 효율성과 정확성의 균형** / Balancing computational efficiency and accuracy: 비용이 많이 드는 베이지안 추론의 이점을 유지하면서 학습 기반 신념 모델의 빠른 처리 속도 확보
**실제 응용 가능성** / Practical applications: 환경 오염 모니터링, 질병 추적, 의료 이미징 등 다양한 필드에서 활용 가능한 일반적인 프레임워크 제공

articles.title: Evaluating Strategic Reasoning in Forecasting Agents
articles.titleKo: 예측 에이전트의 전략적 추론 평가

articles.aiSummary:
This research addresses a critical gap in forecasting benchmarks: understanding why some AI predictive systems are more accurate than others. While existing benchmarks only rank forecasting accuracy, they provide little insight into the underlying reasons for performance differences. The researchers developed Bench to the Future 2 (BTF-2), featuring 1,417 backcasting questions and a frozen corpus of 15 million research documents, allowing AI agents to conduct reproducible offline research and forecasting with full reasoning traces visible for analysis. BTF-2 achieves remarkable sensitivity, detecting accuracy differences as small as 0.004 Brier score, and can differentiate whether an agent's strengths lie in information retrieval versus judgment. The team constructed a composite forecaster achieving 0.011 Brier score improvement over any single frontier agent, demonstrating the value of systematic analysis. The significance lies in providing actionable insights for improving AI forecasting capabilities and identifying specific performance drivers. However, the study's limitation is that evaluation on historical data may not fully generalize to genuinely novel future forecasting scenarios.

##
articles.aiSummaryKo:
이 연구는 예측 AI 시스템이 정확한 예측을 내리는 이유를 파악하기 위해 설계되었습니다. 기존 벤치마크는 예측 정확도만 제시하지만, 어떤 예측 시스템이 더 나은 성과를 내는지에 대한 원인 분석이 부족했습니다. 연구팀은 1,417개의 과거 예측 문제와 1,500만 개 문서의 고정된 연구 자료로 구성된 'Bench to the Future 2(BTF-2)' 벤치마크를 개발했습니다. 이를 통해 AI 에이전트들이 오프라인에서 재현 가능하게 연구하고 예측하는 전체 추론 과정을 추적할 수 있습니다. BTF-2는 0.004 Brier 점수 수준의 정교한 정확도 차이를 감지할 수 있으며, 어느 에이전트가 정보 수집에서 강한지, 판단에서 강한지를 구분할 수 있습니다. 연구팀은 단일 최고 성능 에이전트보다 0.011 Brier 점수로 더 정확한 예측 시스템을 구축했습니다. 이 연구의 의의는 AI 예측 능력의 개선 방향을 명확히 하고, 향후 더 나은 예측 시스템 개발에 기여한다는 점입니다. 다만 과거 데이터로 평가하기 때문에 미래 예측에 대한 일반화 가능성이 제한될 수 있습니다.

##
articles.aiSummaryEn:

The researchers developed Bench to the Future 2 (BTF-2), featuring 1,417 backcasting questions and a frozen corpus of 15 million research documents, allowing AI agents to conduct reproducible offline research and forecasting with full reasoning traces visible for analysis. BTF-2 achieves remarkable sensitivity, detecting accuracy differences as small as 0.004 Brier score, and can differentiate whether an agent's strengths lie in information retrieval versus judgment. The team constructed a composite forecaster achieving 0.011 Brier score improvement over any single frontier agent, demonstrating the value of systematic analysis. The significance lies in providing actionable insights for improving AI forecasting capabilities and identifying specific performance drivers. However, the study's limitation is that evaluation on historical data may not fully generalize to genuinely novel future forecasting scenarios.

##
keyPoints: **상세한 추론 추적**: 단순 정확도 점수가 아닌 AI의 전체 추론 과정을 기록하고 분석하여 어디서 실수가 발생하는지 파악 가능 / **Detailed Reasoning Traces**: Records complete reasoning processes rather than just accuracy scores, enabling identification of failure points in AI forecasting logic

**미세한 성능 차이 감지**: 0.004 Brier 점수 수준의 작은 정확도 차이까지 구분 가능하여 에이전트 간 진정한 성능 차이 측정 / **Fine-grained Performance Detection**: Sensitivity down to 0.004 Brier score enables meaningful differentiation between agents rather than false equivalence

**연구 vs 판단 능력 분리**: 정보 검색 능력과 의사결정 능력을 별도로 평가하여 AI 개선의 구체적 방향 제시 / **Separates Research from Judgment**: Distinguishes between information retrieval strengths and decision-making quality, providing specific improvement targets

**앙상블 방식의 우수성**: 단일 최고 성능 에이전트보다 여러 에이전트를 조합한 시스템이 0.011 Brier 점수 더 나은 성능 달성 / **Ensemble Superiority**: Combining multiple agents outperforms any single best agent by 0.011 Brier score, validating ensemble forecasting approaches

articles.title: A hidden map in your nose could explain how smell works
articles.titleKo: 당신의 코에 숨겨진 지도가 냄새 작용 방식을 설명할 수 있다
articles.summary: Scientists have finally cracked one of the biggest mysteries in the senses: how smell is organized. By mapping millions of neurons in mice, researchers discovered that smell receptors in the nose aren’t random at all—they’re arranged in neat, overlapping stripes based on receptor type, forming a hidden structure scientists never knew existed. Even more striking, this layout mirrors how smell information is mapped in the brain, revealing a coordinated system from nose to neural circuits.
articles.aiSummary:
How smell is organized in our sensory system has remained one of science's biggest unanswered questions. Researchers mapped millions of neurons in mice's noses to investigate how smell receptors are arranged. The study revealed that smell receptors in the nose are not randomly distributed but instead form neat, overlapping stripes organized by receptor type—a previously unknown hidden structure. Remarkably, this physical arrangement in the nose perfectly mirrors how smell information is mapped and processed in the brain. This discovery demonstrates a coordinated system where olfactory signals are systematically organized from the nose all the way through neural circuits. The findings have significant implications for understanding the fundamental mechanisms of how smell works and could lead to future treatments for smell-related disorders. However, since the research was conducted on mice, further studies are needed to confirm whether the same organizational principles apply to human olfactory systems.

##
articles.aiSummaryKo:
후각의 조직 방식은 오랫동안 과학의 미해결 과제였다. 연구팀은 쥐의 코에 있는 수백만 개의 신경세포를 매핑하는 방식으로 후각 수용체의 배열 구조를 조사했다. 연구 결과, 코의 후각 수용체들이 무작위로 배치된 것이 아니라 수용체 종류별로 깔끔하게 줄을 지어 겹쳐지는 패턴을 이루고 있다는 것을 발견했다. 놀랍게도 이러한 물리적 배치는 뇌에서 후각 정보를 처리하는 지도와 정확히 일치한다는 사실이 밝혀졌다. 이 발견은 코에서 뇌까지 후각 정보가 조직적이고 체계적으로 전달되는 메커니즘을 설명해준다. 이 연구는 후각 시스템의 기본 원리를 이해하는 데 획기적 의의를 가지며, 추후 후각 관련 질환 치료법 개발로 이어질 수 있다. 다만 쥐를 대상으로 한 연구이므로 인간의 후각 시스템에 동일하게 적용되는지는 추가 검증이 필요하다.

articles.title: Regular sex is linked to fewer daily menopause symptoms, survey finds
articles.titleKo: 정기적인 성관계가 폐경 증상 완화와 관련이 있다는 조사 결과
articles.summary: A recent survey of middle-aged and older Japanese women shows that maintaining a regular sex life is linked to lower odds of experiencing dryness, irritation, and pain in the pelvic region during everyday activities.
articles.aiSummary:
A recent survey of middle-aged and older Japanese women reveals that maintaining a regular sexual life is associated with reduced odds of experiencing menopausal symptoms. The research specifically examined the frequency of pelvic-related symptoms such as dryness, irritation, and pain during daily activities in menopausal women. Researchers found that women who maintained regular sexual activity had significantly lower rates of experiencing these bothersome menopausal symptoms compared to those without regular sexual activity. This finding is significant because it suggests a new lifestyle intervention approach for managing menopausal symptoms. However, the study has limitations as it is survey-based and cannot definitively establish causation, and the sample was limited to women from a specific cultural context (Japan). Further research involving diverse populations and regions would be needed to validate these findings.

##
articles.aiSummaryKo:

articles.summary: arXiv:2604.26120v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Behavioral logs provide rich signals for user modeling, but are noisy and interleaved across diverse intents. Recent work uses LLMs to generate interpretable natural-language personas from user logs, yet evaluation often emphasizes downstream utility, providing limited assurance of persona quality itself. We formulate persona induction as an optimization problem over perso
articles.aiSummary:
This research proposes a hierarchical framework for automatically generating trustworthy user personas from behavioral log data. While previous studies used large language models (LLMs) to create natural language personas, they lacked sufficient validation of persona quality itself. The research team developed a hierarchical approach that first classifies diverse user behaviors into intent-specific memories, then generates multiple evidence-grounded personas through clustering and labeling these memories. The method formalizes persona induction as an optimization problem, ensuring that generated personas are grounded in actual user behavioral data. The significance lies in enabling direct validation of persona quality itself, rather than relying solely on downstream task performance evaluation. However, the provided abstract summary lacks specific experimental results, dataset scale, and performance improvement metrics that would indicate research limitations.

##

articles.aiSummary:
Left ventricular ejection fraction (LVEF) assessment, a critical indicator of cardiac health, currently relies exclusively on echocardiography, limiting accessibility in primary care and resource-constrained settings. Researchers developed a multimodal machine-learning framework that integrates 12-lead electrocardiogram (ECG) time-series data with electronic health records (EHR) variables to classify LVEF into four clinically-used categories: normal (>50%), mildly reduced (40-50%), moderately reduced (30-40%), and severely reduced (<30%). The team employed SHAP attribution analysis to identify the most influential ECG and EHR features, addressing the "black box" problem of artificial intelligence by ensuring model explainability. This approach has significant potential to improve access to heart failure diagnosis in primary care settings and resource-limited regions. However, limitations include the need for validation in real clinical environments and evaluation across diverse racial and demographic populations.

##
articles.aiSummaryKo:

articles.summary: arXiv:2604.25943v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Efficient and stable solution of partial differential equations (PDEs) is central to scientific and engineering applications, yet existing numerical solvers rely heavily on matrix based discretizations, while learning based methods require costly training and often suffer from limited generalization. In this work, we proposes a PDE energy driven framework that solves PDEs through physically constrained diffusion iterations, without relying on classical matrix based finite element assembly or data driven neural network training. The proposed metho
articles.aiSummary:
This study proposes a novel framework for efficiently and stably solving partial differential equations (PDEs), a fundamental problem in scientific and engineering applications. Traditional matrix-based numerical methods require extensive computational resources, while data-driven deep learning approaches suffer from high training costs and poor generalization. The research team developed a new approach using physics-constrained diffusion iterations to solve PDEs without relying on classical finite element matrix assembly or neural network training. This method leverages PDE energy as a driving force for iterative solutions. The framework enables faster and more stable simulations of complex physical phenomena in science and engineering. However, further validation of its applicability across diverse problem types and performance comparison with existing methods is needed.

##
articles.aiSummaryKo:
본 연구는 편미분방정식(PDE)을 효율적이고 안정적으로 풀기 위한 새로운 프레임워크를 제안합니다. 기존의 행렬 기반 수치해석 방법은 계산량이 많고, 딥러닝 기반 방법은 학습 비용이 크고 일반화 성능이 떨어지는 문제가 있었습니다. 연구팀은 물리적 제약 조건을 활용한 확산 반복 과정을 통해 PDE를 풀 수 있는 새로운 방식을 개발했습니다. 이 방법은 전통적인 유한요소법 행렬 계산이나 신경망 학습 없이도 PDEs를 해결할 수 있다는 점이 특징입니다. 이 접근 방식은 과학 및 공학 분야의 복잡한 물리 시뮬레이션을 더 빠르고 안정적으로 수행할 수 있게 해줍니다. 다만, 이 방법의 실제 적용 범위와 다양한 문제 유형에 대한 성능 검증이 추가로 필요합니다.

##

articles.aiSummary:
This paper addresses the importance of communication mechanisms among agents in multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL). The research team investigates how graph neural networks (GNNs) can facilitate agent communication based on interaction graphs, enabling agents to enhance their internal representations through information exchange and improve coordination. This approach allows agents to converge more effectively on their objectives through shared information. While MARL research utilizing GNN-based communication is growing, there is a lack of systematic framework and structure to clearly distinguish and classify these diverse approaches. The significance of this survey lies in providing a coherent classification system for these methodologies in the field. However, the limitation is that the paper emphasizes literature review rather than specific experimental data or quantitative performance comparisons. This framework is expected to serve as a guide for researchers in the MARL field to select optimal communication mechanisms.

##
articles.aiSummaryKo:

articles.title: Science debunks the fashion myth that vertical stripes are always slimming
articles.titleKo: 과학이 밝혀낸 진실: 세로 줄무늬가 항상 날씬해 보이는 것은 아니다
articles.summary: Do vertical stripes actually make a person look thinner? A new study published in i-Perception provides evidence that horizontal pencil stripes can produce a more slimming effect. Researchers found that specific line spacing and direction alter our visual judgment of human figures.
articles.aiSummary:
A new study challenges the popular fashion myth that vertical stripes always make people look slimmer. Published in the journal i-Perception, research provides evidence that horizontal pencil stripes can actually produce a more slimming effect than vertical ones. The study demonstrates that specific line spacing and direction significantly alter our visual perception of human figures. Researchers found that the arrangement and orientation of stripes influence how our brains judge body size and proportions. These findings provide scientific backing for fashion and clothing design decisions, helping consumers make more informed choices about their wardrobes. However, the research has limitations as variables such as individual body type, skin tone, lighting conditions, and fabric texture may affect the actual visual impact in real-world situations.

##
articles.aiSummaryKo:
세로 줄무늬가 항상 날씬해 보인다는 일반적인 패션 통념을 검증하기 위해 과학자들이 새로운 연구를 진행했다. 연구팀은 i-Perception 저널에 발표한 논문을 통해 가로 가는 줄무늬가 오히려 더 날씬한 효과를 낼 수 있다는 증거를 제시했다. 이 연구는 인간의 시각적 인지가 줄무늬의 간격과 방향에 따라 어떻게 달라지는지를 보여준다. 구체적인 실험 결과에 따르면 특정한 선의 배치와 방향이 신체 크기 인지에 유의미한 영향을 미친다. 이 발견은 패션과 의류 설계에 있어 과학적 근거를 제공함으로써 소비자들이 더 나은 의류 선택을 할 수 있도록 돕는다. 다만 개인의 신체 타입, 피부색, 조명 등 다양한 변수가 실제 효과에 영향을 미칠 수 있다는 점이 연구의 한계로 남아있다.

##

articles.title: Rethinking KV Cache Eviction via a Unified Information-Theoretic Objective
articles.titleKo: KV 캐시 제거를 통합 정보 이론적 목적함수로 재검토하기
articles.summary: arXiv:2604.25975v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Key-value (KV) caching is essential for large language model inference, yet its memory overhead poses a critical bottleneck for long-context generation. Existing eviction policies predominantly rely on empirical heuristics, lacking a rigorous theoretical foundation. This work rethinks KV cache eviction through the lens of the Information Bottleneck principle. Under a linear-Gaussian surrogate of attention, we derive a closed-form mutual information objective that characterizes the effective information capacity of a retained KV cache subset. This
articles.aiSummary:
Large Language Models (LLMs) use KV caching to store previous computations for faster inference, but memory constraints become critical during long-context generation. Existing eviction policies rely primarily on empirical heuristics without rigorous theoretical foundations. This research reconsiders KV cache eviction through the Information Bottleneck principle from information theory. By using a linear-Gaussian surrogate model of attention mechanisms, the researchers derived a closed-form mutual information objective function that characterizes the effective information capacity of retained KV cache subsets. This approach provides a theoretically sound foundation for balancing memory efficiency with model performance optimization. The significance lies in replacing ad-hoc methods with mathematically rigorous cache management principles rooted in information theory. However, the linear-Gaussian approximation may not perfectly capture the complexity of actual attention mechanisms in practical applications.

##
articles.aiSummaryKo:
대규모 언어 모델(LLM)은 빠른 응답을 위해 이전 계산 결과를 저장하는 KV 캐시를 사용하는데, 긴 문맥을 처리할 때 메모리 부족이 심각한 문제가 된다. 기존 연구들은 주로 경험적 휴리스틱에 의존하여 어떤 정보를 버릴지 결정했지만, 이론적 근거가 부족했다. 이 연구는 정보이론의 '정보 병목(Information Bottleneck)' 원칙을 적용하여 KV 캐시 제거 정책을 재검토한다. 선형-가우시안 근사 모델을 사용하여 남겨진 KV 캐시의 유효 정보 용량을 수학적으로 계산할 수 있는 상호정보(mutual information) 목적함수를 도출했다. 이 접근법은 메모리 효율성과 모델 성능 사이의 균형을 이론적으로 최적화하는 기초를 제공한다. 연구의 의의는 기존의 임시방편적 방법에서 벗어나 수학적으로 엄밀한 캐시 관리 원칙을 제시하는 것이다. 다만 선형-가우시안 근사가 실제 주의(attention) 메커니즘을 완벽하게 표현하지 못할 수 있다는 한계가 있다.

##
articles.aiSummaryEn:

This research reconsiders KV cache eviction through the Information Bottleneck principle from information theory. By using a linear-Gaussian surrogate model of attention mechanisms, the researchers derived a closed-form mutual information objective function that characterizes the effective information capacity of retained KV cache subsets. This approach provides a theoretically sound foundation for balancing memory efficiency with model performance optimization. The significance lies in replacing ad-hoc methods with mathematically rigorous cache management principles rooted in information theory. However, the linear-Gaussian approximation may not perfectly capture the complexity of actual attention mechanisms in practical applications.

##
keyPoints: **KV 캐시 메모리 문제** / KV cache memory bottleneck: LLM의 장문맥 처리 시 메모리 오버헤드가 추론 속도의 주요 제약 요소
**정보이론 기반 접근** / Information-theoretic foundation: 기존 휴리스틱 기반 제거 정책 대신 정보 병목(Information Bottleneck) 원칙으로 이론화
**수학적 최적화 목적함수** / Mutual information objective: 선형-가우시안 모델 하에서 남겨진 캐시의 유효 정보 용량을 정량적으로 측정 가능
**실무적 한계와 향후 과제** / Theoretical-practical gap: 선형-가우시안 근사의 단순화로 인한 실제 주의 메커니즘 표현 한계 존재

articles.title: Untrained CNNs Match Backpropagation at V1: A Systematic RSA Comparison of Four Learning Rules Against Human fMRI
articles.titleKo: 훈련되지 않은 CNN이 V1에서 역전파와 일치함: 네 가지 학습 규칙을 인간 fMRI와 체계적으로 비교하는 RSA 분석
articles.summary: arXiv:2604.16875v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: A central question in computational neuroscience is whether the learning rule used to train a neural network determines how well its internal representations align with those of the human visual cortex. We present a systematic comparison of four learning rules (backpropagation (BP), feedback alignment (FA), predictive coding (PC), and spike-timing-dependent plasticity (STDP)) applied to identical convolutional architectures and evaluated against human fMRI data from the THINGS-fMRI dataset (720 stimuli, 3 subjects) using Representationa
articles.aiSummary:
This computational neuroscience study investigates whether the learning rule used to train neural networks determines how well their internal representations align with human visual cortex representations. Researchers systematically compared four learning rules—backpropagation (BP), feedback alignment (FA), predictive coding (PC), and spike-timing-dependent plasticity (STDP)—applied to identical convolutional neural network architectures. Using representational similarity analysis (RSA) against human fMRI data from the THINGS-fMRI dataset (720 stimuli, 3 subjects), they found that untrained CNNs matched backpropagation-trained networks in alignment with V1 visual cortex. This surprising finding suggests that neural network architecture itself naturally reflects how biological visual systems organize information. However, the study's limitations include a small number of subjects and reliance on specific visual stimuli, with alignment potentially being weaker in higher visual areas.

##
articles.aiSummaryKo:
이 연구는 신경망을 훈련하는 학습 규칙이 인간의 시각 피질 표현과 얼마나 잘 일치하는지를 조사한 계산신경과학 연구입니다. 연구팀은 역전파(BP), 피드백 정렬(FA), 예측 부호화(PC), 스파이크-타이밍-의존 가소성(STDP)이라는 4가지 학습 규칙을 동일한 합성곱 신경망 구조에 적용했습니다. 인간 fMRI 데이터(THINGS-fMRI 데이터셋, 720개 자극, 3명 피험자)와 표현 유사성 분석(RSA)을 사용하여 비교한 결과, 훈련되지 않은 CNN도 역전파로 훈련된 신경망만큼 V1 시각 영역과 잘 일치한다는 놀라운 발견을 얻었습니다. 이는 신경망의 구조 자체가 생물학적 시각 체계의 표현 방식을 자연스럽게 반영할 수 있음을 시사합니다. 다만 이 연구는 제한된 수의 피험자와 특정 시각 자극에만 기반했으며, 더 높은 시각 영역에서의 일치성은 덜 강할 수 있다는 한계가 있습니다.

##
articles.aiSummaryEn:
This computational neuroscience study investigates whether the learning rule used to train neural networks determines how well their internal representations align with human visual cortex representations. Researchers systematically compared four learning rules—backpropagation (BP), feedback alignment (FA), predictive coding (PC), and spike-timing-dependent plasticity (STDP)—applied to identical convolutional neural network architectures. Using representational similarity analysis (RSA) against human fMRI data from the THINGS-fMRI dataset (720 stimuli, 3 subjects), they found that untrained CNNs matched backpropagation-trained networks in alignment with V1 visual cortex. This surprising finding suggests that neural network architecture itself naturally reflects how biological visual systems organize information. However, the study's limitations include a small number of subjects and reliance on specific visual stimuli, with alignment potentially being weaker in higher visual areas.

##
keyPoints: **구조의 중요성** / **Importance of Architecture**: 신경망의 학습 규칙보다 기본 구조가 생물학적 시각 표현과의 일치성을 결정하는 더 중요한 요소일 수 있음 / The basic architecture of neural networks may be a more important determinant of alignment with biological visual representations than the specific learning rule used

**역전파의 필요성 재검토** / **Questioning Backpropagation Necessity**: 역전파가 신경망이 생물학적 시각계와 유사하게 작동하는 데 반드시 필요하지 않을 수 있으며, 다른 학습 메커니즘도 동등한 결과를 달성 가능 / Backpropagation may not be necessary for neural networks to operate similarly to biological vision systems, with alternative learning mechanisms achieving comparable results

**V1 특화 패턴** / **V1-Specific Pattern**: 초기 시각 영역(V1)에서의 강한 일치는 신경망 구조가 기본적인 시각 처리의 생물학적 원리를 자연스럽게 구현함을 의미 / Strong alignment in early visual area V1 suggests that network architecture naturally implements fundamental principles of biological visual processing

**높은 영역 확대 필요** / **Need for Higher Area Investigation**: 더 높은 시각 영역에서의 불일치 가능성이 있어 향후 연구에서는 복잡한 시각 인식과 관련된 뇌 영역까지 확대 분석이 필요 / Potential misalignment in higher visual areas indicates future research should expand analysis to brain regions involved in complex visual perception and object recognition

articles.title: ‘We Have Never Been Individuals’
articles.titleKo: '우리는 결코 개인이었던 적이 없다'
articles.summary: Take a long, deep breath in. Now slowly let it out. Each time you inhale, you’re drawing in oxygen from the plants around you. Once in your lungs, oxygen navigates the bloodstream, where it gets exchanged for carbon dioxide. With each exhale, you fill the air with carbon dioxide, the very substance that all these plants need for photosynthesis. What we breathe out, plants breathe in. What plants breathe out, we breathe in. The air you breathe is the collective breath of other living beings. You are immersed in the world. And the world is immersed in you. Your body hosts a remarkable diversity
articles.aiSummary:
This article presents a philosophical perspective that humans are not independent individuals but interconnected beings deeply embedded in their environment. Using breathing as an example, it illustrates the reciprocal relationship between humans, plants, and the entire ecosystem. The oxygen we inhale comes from plants, while the carbon dioxide we exhale is essential for plant photosynthesis, demonstrating that humans cannot be separated from nature. The article also mentions the scientific fact that human bodies host diverse microbial ecosystems. This perspective challenges individualistic worldviews and provides a deeper understanding of interconnectedness. However, the article lacks specific empirical data or research participant information, presenting primarily philosophical arguments rather than experimental evidence.

##
articles.aiSummaryKo:
본 기사는 인간이 독립적인 개체가 아니라 주변 환경과 긴밀하게 연결된 존재라는 철학적 관점을 제시한다. 호흡 과정을 예로 들어 인간과 식물, 그리고 전체 생태계 간의 상호 교환 관계를 설명한다. 우리가 들이마시는 산소는 식물에서 나오고, 우리가 내쉬는 이산화탄소는 식물의 광합성에 필수적이라는 점을 통해 인간이 환경과 분리될 수 없음을 보여준다. 또한 인간의 몸이 다양한 미생물 생태계를 호스팅하고 있다는 과학적 사실을 언급한다. 이러한 관점은 개인주의적 세계관을 재검토하도록 하며, 상호연결성에 대한 깊은 이해를 제공한다. 다만 철학적 주장으로 제시되어 구체적인 실증적 데이터나 연구 참가자 정보가 부재하다는 한계가 있다.

##
articles.aiSummaryEn:
This article presents a philosophical perspective that humans are not independent individuals but interconnected beings deeply embedded in their environment. Using breathing as an example, it illustrates the reciprocal relationship between humans, plants, and the entire ecosystem. The oxygen we inhale comes from plants, while the carbon dioxide we exhale is essential for plant photosynthesis, demonstrating that humans cannot be separated from nature. The article also mentions the scientific fact that human bodies host diverse microbial ecosystems. This perspective challenges individualistic worldviews and provides a deeper understanding of interconnectedness. However, the article lacks specific empirical data or research participant information, presenting primarily philosophical arguments rather than experimental evidence.

##
keyPoints: **상호호흡적 순환**: 인간과 식물은 호흡을 통해 산소와 이산화탄소를 교환하며, 이는 생명체 간 상호의존성을 보여준다. / Reciprocal Respiration: Humans and plants exchange oxygen and carbon dioxide through breathing, demonstrating mutual interdependence between living beings.

**환경과의 불가분 관계**: 개인은 세상에 잠긴 것이 아니라 세상이 개인 안에 잠겨있으며, 이는 인간-환경의 이분법을 거부한다. / Inseparable Relationship with Environment: The world is immersed within individuals rather than the reverse, rejecting the dichotomy between human and environment.
**미생물 생태계**: 인간의 몸이 다양한 미생물을 호스팅하고 있다는 사실은 개인성이라는 개념을 재정의한다. / Microbial Ecosystem: The human body hosts diverse microbial ecosystems, which redefines the concept of individuality.

**개인주의적 패러다임 전환**: "우리는 결코 개인이었던 적이 없다"는 주장은 기존의 개인주의적 세계관에 대한 근본적 의문을 제기한다. / Paradigm Shift from Individualism: The claim "we have never been individuals" fundamentally questions conventional individualistic worldviews.

articles.title: Subconscious surrender to God predicts long-term addiction recovery, study finds
articles.titleKo: 신을 향한 잠재의식적 항복이 장기 중독 회복을 예측한다는 연구 결과
articles.summary: A new study reveals that subconsciously internalizing a "Surrender to God" coping strategy significantly reduces the risk of long-term addiction relapse in Christian patients. However, this faith-based approach did not reduce daily cravings or increase overall meaning in life.
articles.aiSummary:
A recent study demonstrates that subconsciously internalizing a "Surrender to God" coping mechanism significantly reduces the risk of long-term addiction relapse in Christian patients. Researchers measured how this faith-based coping strategy operates in the brain and found it to be particularly effective in preventing addiction relapse. Surprisingly, however, this faith-based approach did not reduce daily cravings or increase overall meaning in life—suggesting that subconscious faith may operate independently from conscious desires. This finding implies that unconscious and conscious psychological processes can work separately in addiction recovery. The study's significance lies in providing scientific evidence for integrating religious faith elements into psychotherapy more effectively. A limitation is that the research focused exclusively on Christian believers, indicating a need for further studies among other faith traditions and non-religious populations.

##
articles.aiSummaryKo:
이 연구는 기독교 신앙을 가진 중독 환자들이 "신에게 항복"이라는 대처 방식을 무의식적으로 내재화했을 때 장기적인 중독 재발을 크게 줄일 수 있다는 것을 발견했습니다. 연구진은 신앙 기반의 이 대처 전략이 뇌에 어떻게 작동하는지를 측정하였으며, 특히 중독 재발 방지에 효과적임을 확인했습니다. 그러나 흥미롭게도 이러한 신앙 기반 접근법은 일일 갈망(craving)을 줄이거나 삶의 의미감을 높이는 데는 효과가 없었습니다. 이는 무의식적 신앙이 의식적 욕구와는 별개로 작동할 수 있음을 시사합니다. 본 연구의 의의는 심리 치료에 종교적 신앙 요소를 보다 과학적으로 통합할 수 있는 가능성을 제시한 것입니다. 다만 연구가 기독교 신자 집단에 한정되었으므로 다른 종교나 신앙이 없는 인구에 대한 추가 연구가 필요합니다.

##
articles.aiSummaryEn:
A recent study demonstrates that subconsciously internalizing a "Surrender to God" coping mechanism significantly reduces the risk of long-term addiction relapse in Christian patients. Researchers measured how this faith-based coping strategy operates in the brain and found it to be particularly effective in preventing addiction relapse. Surprisingly, however, this faith-based approach did not reduce daily cravings or increase overall meaning in life—suggesting that subconscious faith may operate independently from conscious desires. This finding implies that unconscious and conscious psychological processes can work separately in addiction recovery. The study's significance lies in providing scientific evidence for integrating religious faith elements into psychotherapy more effectively. A limitation is that the research focused exclusively on Christian believers, indicating a need for further studies among other faith traditions and non-religious populations.

##
keyPoints: **무의식적 신앙의 효과** / Subconscious faith mechanisms: "신에게 항복"을 무의식적으로 내재화한 기독교 환자들이 장기 재발률이 현저히 낮음 / Christian patients who subconsciously internalize "surrender to God" show significantly lower long-term relapse rates

**의식과 무의식의 불일치** / Conscious-unconscious dissociation: 재발 방지에는 효과적이지만 일일 갈망 감소나 삶의 의미감 증진에는 비효과적 / Effective for preventing relapse but ineffective for reducing daily cravings or increasing life meaning

**연구의 제한성** / Study limitations: 기독교 신자 중심 연구로 다양한 종교 전통과 무신론자 집단에 대한 추가 연구 필요 / Limited to Christian believers; further research needed among other faiths and non-religious populations

articles.title: Gold digging is strongly linked to psychopathy and dark personality traits, study finds
articles.titleKo: 금전욕이 강한 행동이 정신병질 및 어두운 성격 특성과 밀접하게 연관되어 있다는 연구 결과
articles.summary: Gold digging is often viewed as a female stereotype, but new research suggests it is a broader human mating strategy. The study provides evidence that both men and women use this exploitative approach, which is heavily linked to psychopathy and urban environments.
articles.aiSummary:
A new study challenges the common stereotype that gold digging is exclusively a female behavior, revealing it as a broader human mating strategy employed by both men and women. The research demonstrates that this exploitative dating approach is strongly linked to psychopathic traits and darker personality characteristics. Researchers conducted personality assessments and questionnaires about mating motivations with male and female participants, finding that those intent on gold digging exhibited significantly higher levels of psychopathic features including lack of empathy, manipulativeness, and self-centeredness. Notably, these patterns were more pronounced among urban residents compared to those in other environments. The study contributes to understanding the psychological foundations of human mating strategies and highlights the importance of moving beyond gender stereotypes. However, limitations include potential variations based on sample characteristics and cultural differences that may affect generalizability.

articles.title: Spike in brain attacking autoantibodies linked to early COVID-19 pandemic
articles.titleKo: COVID-19 팬데믹 초기와 연관된 뇌 공격 자가항체의 급증
articles.summary: A massive review of laboratory data reveals that severe autoantibody attacks on the brain surged during the initial COVID-19 outbreak before falling back to baseline as population immunity and vaccination rates increased.
articles.aiSummary:
This study investigated whether autoantibodies attacking the brain surged during the early COVID-19 pandemic through a large-scale analysis of laboratory data. Researchers reviewed extensive laboratory records and compared baseline periods with early pandemic onset and subsequent phases as population immunity and vaccination rates increased. Results showed that the incidence of brain-attacking autoantibodies significantly increased during the early pandemic phase but returned to baseline levels over time as immune protection and vaccination coverage rose. This suggests that COVID-19 infection can trigger autoimmune responses affecting the nervous system. The study's significance lies in clarifying the connection between viral infection and neurological autoimmune disease. However, the research did not definitively establish causality, and further investigation is needed to determine whether these autoantibodies actually caused neurological symptoms in patients.

##
articles.aiSummaryKo:
이 연구는 COVID-19 팬데믹 초기에 뇌를 공격하는 자가항체(자신의 뇌를 공격하는 항체)가 급증했는지를 조사한 대규모 데이터 분석 연구입니다. 연구팀은 광범위한 실험실 데이터를 검토하여 팬데믹 초기와 이후 시점을 비교했습니다. 결과적으로 뇌 공격 자가항체의 발생률이 팬데믹 초기에 현저히 증가했다가 시간이 지나면서 인구 면역력이 높아지고 백신 접종률이 증가함에 따라 기저선 수준으로 돌아갔습니다. 이는 COVID-19 감염이 자가면역 반응을 유발할 수 있음을 시사합니다. 연구의 의의는 바이러스 감염과 신경 자가면역질환의 연관성을 규명한 점입니다. 다만 이 연구는 인과관계를 명확히 증명하지 못했으며, 뇌 공격 자가항체가 실제로 신경 증상을 유발했는지는 추가 연구가 필요합니다.

**시간 경과에 따른 정상화**: 인구 면역력 증강과 백신 접종률 상승에 따라 자가항체 수치가 기저선으로 복귀 / Autoantibody levels returned to baseline as population immunity and vaccination rates increased over time

articles.title: Scientists restore memory by blocking a single Alzheimer’s protein
articles.titleKo: 과학자들, 알츠하이머병 단백질 하나 차단으로 기억력 회복
articles.summary: Researchers have identified a new potential weapon against Alzheimer’s: blocking a protein called PTP1B. In mice, this approach boosted memory and helped brain immune cells clear harmful plaque buildup. Since PTP1B is also linked to diabetes and obesity—both risk factors for Alzheimer’s—it could offer a broader treatment strategy.
articles.aiSummary:
Alzheimer's disease is a neurodegenerative condition characterized by memory decline due to harmful protein accumulation in the brain, and currently lacks effective treatments. Researchers investigated a novel therapeutic approach by blocking a protein called PTP1B using mouse models to explore its potential efficacy. The experimental results demonstrated that blocking PTP1B improved memory in mice and enabled brain immune cells (microglia) to more effectively clear harmful plaques associated with Alzheimer's disease. A significant aspect of this finding is that PTP1B is also linked to diabetes and obesity, both of which are risk factors for Alzheimer's, suggesting the possibility of treating multiple conditions simultaneously through single protein inhibition. However, as this research is based on animal models, additional clinical trials in humans are necessary, and considerable time will be required before developing this into an actual therapeutic treatment.

##
articles.aiSummaryKo:
알츠하이머병은 뇌에 해로운 단백질이 축적되면서 기억력이 감퇴하는 신경퇴행성 질환으로, 현재까지 효과적인 치료법이 부족한 상황이다. 연구진은 PTP1B라는 단백질을 차단하는 방식의 새로운 치료 가능성을 탐색하기 위해 마우스 모델을 이용한 실험을 진행했다. 실험 결과, PTP1B를 차단했을 때 마우스의 기억력이 향상되었으며, 뇌 면역세포(미세아교세포)가 알츠하이머병의 원인 물질인 해로운 플라크를 더 효과적으로 제거할 수 있었다. 이 발견의 중요한 점은 PTP1B가 당뇨병과 비만과도 연관되어 있다는 것으로, 이들은 모두 알츠하이머병의 위험 요인이기 때문에 단일 단백질 차단으로 다중 질환을 동시에 치료할 가능성이 있다. 다만 이 연구는 동물 모델에서의 성과이므로, 인간을 대상으로 한 추가 임상시험이 필요하며 실제 치료법으로 개발되기까지는 상당한 시간이 소요될 것으로 예상된다.

keyPoints: **PTP1B 단백질 차단의 효과** / PTP1B protein blocking effectiveness: 마우스에서 기억력 향상과 뇌 플라크 제거 촉진이 확인됨 / Memory improvement and brain plaque clearance promotion confirmed in mice

articles.title: This AI knew the answers but didn’t understand the questions
articles.titleKo: 이 AI는 답은 알았지만 질문을 이해하지 못했다
articles.summary: For decades, psychologists have debated whether the human mind can be explained by one unified theory or must be broken into separate parts like memory and attention. A recent AI model called Centaur seemed to offer a breakthrough, claiming it could mimic human thinking across 160 different cognitive tasks. But new research is challenging that bold claim, suggesting the model isn’t truly “thinking” at all—it’s just memorizing patterns.
articles.aiSummary:
For decades, psychologists have debated whether the human mind can be explained by one unified theory or must be divided into separate components like memory and attention. A recent AI model called Centaur appeared to be a breakthrough, claiming it could mimic human thinking across 160 different cognitive tasks. However, new research challenges this claim, suggesting the model isn't truly "thinking" but rather memorizing patterns. This finding demonstrates that AI can appear to perform complex cognitive tasks while its underlying processes fundamentally differ from human understanding. The research raises important questions about AI's genuine comprehension capabilities and whether AI models can be reliably used as reference models in human cognitive research. A limitation of this study is that it may have only analyzed the structural characteristics of the Centaur model, and the generalizability of these findings to other AI models remains unclear.

##
articles.aiSummaryKo:
심리학에서는 인간의 정신이 하나의 통합 이론으로 설명될 수 있는지, 아니면 기억, 주의력 같은 독립적 부분으로 나뉘어야 하는지 수십 년간 논쟁해왔다. 최근 'Centaur'라는 AI 모델은 160개의 서로 다른 인지 과제에서 인간의 사고를 모방할 수 있다며 획기적인 돌파구를 제시한 것 같았다. 그러나 새로운 연구에 따르면 이 모델은 실제로 "사고"하는 것이 아니라 단순히 패턴을 암기하고 있을 뿐이다. 이 연구는 AI가 겉으로는 복잡한 인지 작업을 수행하는 것처럼 보여도 그 과정이 인간의 이해와 근본적으로 다를 수 있음을 보여준다. 이러한 발견은 AI의 진정한 이해 능력에 대한 의문을 제기하고, 인간 정신 연구에서 AI를 신뢰할 수 있는 모델로 사용할 수 있는지에 대한 중요한 질문을 던진다. 다만 이 연구의 한계는 Centaur 모델 자체의 구조적 특성만을 분석했을 가능성이 있으며, 다른 AI 모델들에는 어느 정도 일반화될 수 있을지 불명확하다.

##

articles.title: MIT scientists turn chaotic laser light into powerful brain imaging tool
articles.titleKo: MIT 과학자들, 혼란스러운 레이저 빛을 강력한 뇌 영상 도구로 변환
articles.summary: Scientists at MIT discovered that chaotic laser light can spontaneously form a highly focused beam instead of scattering—if the conditions are just right. This “pencil beam” enabled them to image the blood-brain barrier in 3D at speeds 25 times faster than existing techniques. The method also lets researchers watch how drugs move into brain cells in real time. It could dramatically accelerate the development of treatments for neurological diseases.
articles.aiSummary: MIT scientists discovered that chaotic laser light can spontaneously form a highly focused "pencil beam" under specific conditions rather than scattering. Using this phenomenon, the research team developed a novel brain imaging technique that enables 3D visualization of the blood-brain barrier. This method operates 25 times faster than existing imaging techniques and allows researchers to observe drugs moving into brain cells in real time. While the study did not specify the number of experimental participants or clinical trial scale, this technology is expected to dramatically accelerate the development of treatments for neurological diseases. Currently, this approach remains in the experimental research stage, and additional validation is needed before clinical application. Optimization of the complex optical system presents a significant challenge for future implementation.
